languages.text: "Спасибо за вмешательство, Лорд-капитан! Я всегда рад вашему визиту в сектор Бионика — он как ни что иное привносит в работу отсека благословенный порядок".
"Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."
languages.original_text: "Спасибо за вмешательство, Лорд-капитан! Я всегда рад вашему визиту в сектор Бионика — он как ни что иное привносит в работу отсека благословенный порядок".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."
"Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."
"Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカへのご訪問、ありがとうございます。いつもお越しいただき、感謝しております。この場所には、他に類を見ない秩序をもたらしてくださいます」
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."

languages.text: "Müdahaleniz için teşekkürler Lord Kaptan! Sektör Biyonika ziyaretlerinizi daima memnuniyetle karşılıyorum. Buraya başka hiçbir şeyin getiremeyeceği kutsal bir düzen getiriyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."

traits.locale_text: "Müdahaleniz için teşekkürler Lord Kaptan! Sektör Biyonika ziyaretlerinizi daima memnuniyetle karşılıyorum. Buraya başka hiçbir şeyin getiremeyeceği kutsal bir düzen getiriyorsunuz."

languages.text: “感谢您的介入，舰长大人！我时刻欢迎您莅临仿生区——您总能为此地带来无与伦比的神圣秩序。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."

traits.locale_text: “感谢您的介入，舰长大人！我时刻欢迎您莅临仿生区——您总能为此地带来无与伦比的神圣秩序。”

languages.text: "Danke für Euer Eingreifen, Lord Captain! Ich schätze Eure Besuche im Sektor Bionica ... sie bringen wie nichts anderes eine gesegnete Ordnung an diesen Ort.
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."

traits.locale_text: "Danke für Euer Eingreifen, Lord Captain! Ich schätze Eure Besuche im Sektor Bionica ... sie bringen wie nichts anderes eine gesegnete Ordnung an diesen Ort.

languages.text: « Merci pour votre intervention, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Votre seule présence a le don de rappeler tout le monde à l'ordre et vos visites dans le secteur Bionica sont toujours les bienvenues. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."

traits.locale_text: « Merci pour votre intervention, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Votre seule présence a le don de rappeler tout le monde à l'ordre et vos visites dans le secteur Bionica sont toujours les bienvenues. »

languages.text: «¡Gracias por su intervención, Lord Capitán! Siempre es un placer que venga al Sector Bionica. No hay nada que traiga el mismo orden al lugar».
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your intervention, Lord Captain! I always welcome your visits to the Sector Bionica — it brings blessed order to this place like nothing else."

traits.locale_text: «¡Gracias por su intervención, Lord Capitán! Siempre es un placer que venga al Sector Bionica. No hay nada que traiga el mismo orden al lugar».
